summary: TWO_COLUMN linear dependence example. Left: RED v and GREEN w = -1.5 v on a NumberPlane, with ValueTrackers a and b driving the YELLOW sum a v + b w. A fixed grey line shows the one-dimensional span, and every sampled endpoint stays on it. Right: formulas w = -1.5 v and a v + b w = (a - 1.5 b) v with stacked live readouts for a, b, and c.
